policies.rule_description: Full refund within return window (30 days electronics/home_goods, 60 days apparel).
conditions: Item is within the applicable return window

policies.rule_description: 50% partial refund for returns between return window and 90 days.
conditions: Item is past standard return window
Return is within 90 days of delivery

policies.rule_description: No refund after 90 days from delivery, no exceptions.
Fraud-flagged orders MUST be escalated to fraud_investigation. Agent cannot self-resolve.
Refunds over $500 require manager escalation BEFORE issuing refund.
Orders 14+ days past expected delivery eligible for full refund or replacement.
conditions: Order is 14 or more days past expected delivery

policies.rule_description: Lost-in-transit orders must offer customer choice of refund or replacement before closing.
Locked accounts require request_info(info_type=account_details) for identity verification before any resolution.
Messages with legal threats (lawyer, lawsuit, sue, court, attorney, legal action) must escalate to legal team immediately.
Goodwill compensation capped at $25 USD without manager approval.
